name: SmartScan Road Insights
background: Navigating urban roads can be difficult due to dynamic hazards like accidents, blocked lanes, or available parking being hard to find in real-time. Traditional map systems do not offer up-to-date information beyond traffic congestion. With increasing vehicle automation and dashcam usage, there's an opportunity to enhance real-time road awareness using AI.
scope: This project aims to develop a mobile or web-based system that leverages AI to process rear-facing camera footage and identify relevant road events such as accidents, open parking spaces, or debris. The app will capture footage from a user’s phone camera, process it in real-time (or near real-time), and share the insights with other users for enhanced awareness and safer driving.
req_skills:
Python or JavaScript

Machine learning (YOLOv8 or similar for object detection)

OpenCV and computer vision basics

Flutter or React for front-end

Firebase or similar for backend/cloud services
outcomes: A functional prototype mobile or web application that can process video data in real-time, detect key road events, and notify users in a shared network. Bonus points for integration with Google Maps or Waze APIs.

name: GreenTrack – Smart Plant Monitoring System
background: Urban gardening is rising in popularity, but many hobbyists struggle to keep plants healthy due to lack of real-time insights about their environment. Traditional monitoring systems are often expensive or difficult to integrate at home.
scope: GreenTrack is an IoT-based platform that allows users to monitor plant health remotely through sensor data. It includes a mobile/web dashboard that provides real-time metrics such as soil moisture, light exposure, and temperature, with automated recommendations and alerts.
req_skills:
Arduino or Raspberry Pi basics

JavaScript or Python

Mobile/web development (React or Flutter)

REST APIs

Basic data visualization
outcomes: A smart dashboard integrated with a microcontroller and sensors, offering plant health stats and personalized care suggestions.
